description.value: Few places are as hazardous to run through as the scrublands of Marata, and few people spend as much of their time running as young maraquois. You've gained an otherworldly expertise in placing your feet just right to rush over even the roughest ground. When you Stride, ignore the first 10 feet of non-magical difficult terrain, or treat 10 feet of non-magical greater difficult terrain as difficult terrain.
